docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,900.00 FILED BY MASSI, AMANDA DBA FIRST IMPRESSIONS LLC AS TO DEFENDANT FARR, ALEX (WORLD ZOO, A BUSINESS ENTITY FORM UNKNOWN) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-16-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF MASSI, AMANDA DBA FIRST IMPRESSIONS LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED DEC-30-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FARR, ALEX (WORLD ZOO, A BUSINESS ENTITY FORM UNKNOWN)
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-16-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-16-2016 BY HON. DONALD MITCHELL; CLERK M.MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (DEPT. 506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-16-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MASSI, AMANDA DBA FIRST IMPRESSIONS LLC IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FARR, ALEX (WORLD ZOO, A BUSINESS ENTITY FORM UNKNOWN) PARTIES AGREE TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO REFLECT REAL PARTIES: FIRST IMPRESSIONS AS PLAINTIFF AND WORLDZOO AS DEFENDANT. ALL IRREGULARITIES, INCLUDING SERVICE OF PROCESS ON DEFENDANT, ARE WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
